results.title: Kota Rural police bust bike theft gang, recover 37 stolen motorcycles
results.description: Kota Rural Police recovered 37 stolen motorcycles and arrested five suspects under Operation Criminal Dusting; bikes traced across Kota, Bundi, Jhalawar, Baran and MP.

results.title: England vs Norway FIFA World Cup 2026 Quarterfinal Tickets: How to Buy ENG vs NOR Tickets, Prices, Official Resale, Match Date, Time, Venue And Full Squads
results.description: England vs Norway FIFA World Cup 2026 Quarterfinal: England take on Norway in a blockbuster FIFA World Cup 2026 quarterfinal at Hard Rock Stadium in Miami, with a place in the semifinals at stake. While official tickets have largely sold out, fans can still secure seats through FIFA's official resale marketplace and other verified resale platforms. Here's everything you need to know about ENG vs NOR tickets, including prices, booking options, match date, kickoff time, venue, stadium details and the full squads. The post England vs Norway FIFA World Cup 2026 Quarterfinal Tickets: How to Buy ENG vs NOR Tickets, Prices, Official Resale, Match Date, Time, Venue And Full Squads appeared first on The Sunday Guardian .

results.title: US Democrat Ro Khanna Detained By Israeli Settlers During West Bank Visit
results.description: Most countries and the United Nations regard Israeli settlements in the West Bank as illegal.

results.title: 1.8 million evacuated, thousands flee: Typhoon Bavi heads to China after wreaking havoc in Japan, Taiwan, Philippines
results.description: The storm triggered mass evacuations, disrupted flights and left thousands without power before nearing eastern China's coast.

results.title: Kapil Sharma Show star reveals he grew up in one room home, mother had to stitch clothes for a living: ‘We couldn’t even pay...’
results.description: Rajiv Thakur faced significant economic hardship during his childhood. He grew up in a cramped one-room home with limited privacy and facilities. The 1984 unrest destroyed his father's business, plunging the family into deeper poverty. His mother stitched clothes, and even butter was a rare luxury for them. Today, Thakur is a successful comedian and actor with a considerable net worth.

results.title: Ananda Group chairman to receive lifetime achievement award
results.description: Ananda Group chairman Uddaraju Kasi Viswanadha Raju to receive lifetime achievement award alongside three others in New Delhi on July 28.
